ensemble_rules_only.notes: Rules-only retrieval ensemble (no LLM, n=30). 5-stage pipeline: BM25 broad recall → 5 specialist retrievers (entity, temporal, commitment, relationship, intent_keyword) → RRF fusion (k=60) → context engineering (dedup, chronological, top-8) → structural memory. LLM was off (Kaggle tunnel dead). Result: BM25=0.6222, Maestro=0.5833, lift=-3.9pts, MRR=1.0pts. Maestro beats BM25 on MRR but not on answer score. Per-type wins: at_risk +33.3, recurring +25.0, relational +16.7. Remaining regressions: contradiction -50.0 (worst — BM25 nails it, ensemble returns 'No active situation found' because Orion Tech has no LivingSituation despite the ensemble finding 5 evidence items), critical -33.3, noise_lookup -16.7, broken 0.0 (RRF weight tuning needed).

pre_ensemble.description: Before retrieval ensemble (n=10, LLM llama3:8b via Kaggle)

post_ensemble_rules_only.description: After retrieval ensemble, rules only (n=30, no LLM)
post_ensemble_rules_only.note: All numbers derived from structured fields. lift_B_vs_A is authoritative. See per_type_A/per_type_B for type-level breakdown. Previous chat claim of a different lift figure was corrected — the structured field is the source of truth.

summary.next_step: Re-run with LLM (OpenRouter free-tier first, then $10 on deepseek/deepseek-r1 for conditional reasoning). Target: lift B vs A >= +15pts to clear Gate 1.
